name: Orangeville G Test Route 1
description: Full G road test route through Orangeville combining plaza exit, Highway 10 bypass (80 km/h), downtown Broadway (50 km/h), and residential streets with school zones (40 km/h). Includes highway lane changes, yield sign exit, downtown right-on-red traps, and three consecutive 4-way stops in residential area.
tips: Bắt buộc lùi xe vào chuồng (Reverse Park) khi đến trung tâm chờ thi để lúc xuất phát đi ra dễ dàng và an toàn hơn.

waypoints.instruction: Start: Exit plaza, turn right behind the building
Traffic light — turn left onto Highway 10 / First St
Highway 80 km/h — merge left, then move to right lane
Highway lane changes: left lane then back to right lane
Traffic light — turn left onto First Street
First St — right lane added, move right. Pass Hansen Blvd
Move to left lane, turn left onto Fifth Avenue. Yield to oncoming traffic
Move to right lane, turn right at light onto bypass — accelerate to 80 km/h
Highway lane changes (round 2): left then back to right
Exit right onto Broadway — YIELD sign, check pedestrians & traffic from left
Broadway downtown (50 km/h). Right lane becomes right-turn-only — move to left lane
Turn right onto Second Avenue — residential 40 km/h zone
Turn right into DriveTest Centre entrance. Front-in park. Done!

speedZones.label: Second Avenue (Residential Zone — DO NOT exceed 40)

hazards.description: Broadway exit — Yield sign. Check pedestrians and traffic from left before merging.
TRAP: Right lane becomes right-turn-only on Broadway. Must signal and move to left lane to continue straight — do NOT wait for examiner to tell you.
TRAP: When turning right on red downtown, must come to COMPLETE stop. If green but pedestrians stepping off curb, wait until they reach the far sidewalk before moving.
TRAP: Cars parked on Second Ave — maintain at least 1 meter clearance when passing.
TRAP: When stopped at red light on highway, stop far enough behind the car ahead that you can see their rear tires touching the pavement.
All-way stop #1 — full stop required, check all directions
All-way stop #2 — full stop, then turn left
All-way stop #3 — full stop, then turn right
